# Venue-Policy Verification Checklist

## Venue
- Venue name: ____
- Submission date: ____

## Authorship policy
- [ ] Venue authorship policy verified
- [ ] Contribution record format matches venue requirements
- [ ] Corresponding author identified

## AI-use policy
- [ ] Venue AI-use policy verified at submission time
- [ ] AI assistance disclosed per venue format
- [ ] No agent/model represented as human author

## Reproducibility policy
- [ ] Venue reproducibility requirements verified
- [ ] Data availability statement matches venue format
- [ ] Code availability statement matches venue format

## Ethics policy
- [ ] Venue ethics statement requirements verified
- [ ] Human-subjects determination documented (if relevant)
- [ ] Conflict of interest statement matches venue format

## License policy
- [ ] Venue license requirements verified
- [ ] Dataset licenses compatible with venue policy
- [ ] Code license compatible with venue policy

## Current-policy verification
- [ ] Policy checked at submission time (not historical)
- [ ] Policy URL recorded: ____
- [ ] Policy version/date recorded: ____
